item.title: My First Post
item.description:
Welcome to My Blog!

This is the English version of my first post.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Who is Geroen Joris?

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

I specialize in AWS, DevSecOps, software architecture, and security. My goal is to share my expertise and contribute to the tech community.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get in Touch

Feel free to reach out to me via LinkedIn or GitHub.

  • LinkedIn: geroenjoris
  • GitHub: gjoris
